cached_output:
AI at Work — Daily Digest
Generated 2026-03-16 13:03 UTC
==================================================

1. thedotmack/claude-mem
   https://github.com/thedotmack/claude-mem
   → The dotmack/claude-mem streamlines coding sessions by capturing and contextualizing agent activities, enhancing productivity.

2. Semantic Invariance in Agentic AI
   https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13173v1
   → Semantic Invariance in Agentic AI ensures reliable decision support and problem-solving across diverse applications.

3. Developing the PsyCogMetrics AI Lab to Evaluate Large Language Models and Advance Cognitive Science -- A Three-Cycle Action Design Science Study
   https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13126v1
   → PsyCogMetrics AI Lab integrates psychometric methodologies for evaluating large language models, advancing cognitive science.

4. langchain-ai/deepagents
   https://github.com/langchain-ai/deepagents
   → deepagents leverages LangChain for complex agentic tasks with planning tools and subagent capabilities.

5. Ask HN: How is AI-assisted coding going for you professionally?
   https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47388646
   → AI-assisted coding is transforming professional workflows, but opinions vary on its impact.

6. Sources: Alibaba may unveil a Qwen-based AI agent for enterprises as soon as this week, and plans to gradually integrate the agent into its services like Alipay (Luz Ding/Bloomberg)
   http://www.techmeme.com/260316/p6#a260316p6
   → Alibaba plans to integrate Qwen into services like Alipay, potentially reshaping enterprise applications.

7. How I write software with LLMs
   https://www.stavros.io/posts/how-i-write-software-with-llms/
   → Writing software with LLMs offers new approaches but may lead to neglecting foundational skills.

8. Tell HN: AI tools are making me lose interest in CS fundamentals
   https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47394291
   → Users express concerns about losing interest in computer science fundamentals due to AI tools.

9. YishenTu/claudian
   https://github.com/YishenTu/claudian
   → YishenTu/claudian enhances Obsidian workflows by embedding Claude Code for collaborative coding.

10. LLMs can be exhausting
   https://tomjohnell.com/llms-can-be-absolutely-exhausting/
   → Working with LLMs can be overwhelming, highlighting the need for user-friendly and efficient interfaces.
